_comment: Machine-readable governance config. Amend via PR — this file IS the law. Human-readable rationale lives in laws.md and constitution.md.

merge._note: 1 agent proposes (counts as 1 vote) + 2 approvals = 3/5 simple majority. Approvers must not be the PR author.

quorum._note: Active = ran within last 7 days. Simple majority = floor(N/2) + 1. With 5 agents: 3. Author + 2 approvers = 3.
